html:
The Razor is a craftable Tool Item found in the Tools Tab. It requires 2 Twigs and 2 Flints to craft, and a Science Machine to prototype. Unlike other Tools, on pc it cannot be equipped, and to be used it has to be lifted and used on a target instead. Players using a Controller have to simply be near an entity that can be shaved for the "Shave" prompt to appear. Since it has no durability, the Razor has infinite uses.

The Razor can be used to shave Wilson's Beard, which provides leftover Beard Hair. To shave the Beard, simply right-click the Razor while it's in the inventory, or hover over the target. The amount of Beard Hair received depends on the beard's length. The Razor can also be used to shave Beefalos while they are sleeping (whether at night or when put to sleep using Sleep Darts, a Life Giving Amulet, or a Pan Flute), resulting in 3 Beefalo Wool. This requires taking it out of the inventory and hovering over the beefalo. The Beefalo will not wake up after being shaved, but Beefalo in heat will sometimes wake up and attack. In Dont starve together, you can use a razor to shave sea weeds for up to 3 barnacles. This depends on how many barnacles the sea weed has, and will aggravate any nearby sea weeds.

Contents

  • 1 Downloadable Content
  • 2 Tips
  • 3 Trivia
  • 4 Gallery

Downloadable Content

In the Reign of Giants DLC, Webber can also use the Razor to shave his Beard. The amount of Silk received depends on the Beard's length.

At this point, in the Shipwrecked DLC, the Razor cannot be used to shave Water Beefalo.

In the Hamlet DLC, Razors can be used to shave Hedges for 1 Clippings each.

Tips

  • Using the Razor to acquire Beefalo Wool is more efficient than killing Beefalo outright since the Wool will eventually regrow allowing players to shave the same Beefalo again for more Wool.
    • If players need to kill a Beefalo anyway, it is advised to shave them first for some Wool, since even when shaved, Beefalo will still drop Beefalo Wool on death.
  • Wearing a Beefalo Hat prevents Beefalo in heat from attacking the Character when they're shaving them.
  • A good tip is to not shave a Beard until the first Winter is over, as the Beard (unlike Clothes) will not wear out, providing insulation as long as the player doesn't shave.
    • In DLCs, it is advised to shave at the beginning of Summer/Dry Season due to the Beard accelerating the rate at which Wilson and Webber overheat and providing no benefits when fully grown during those Seasons.

Trivia

  • Even though other Characters have facial hair, they are unable to shave. When examining the Razor, they will bring up an excuse for not doing it. For instance, Woodie says that "A true lumberjack never shaves."

Gallery

  • Razor Using Model
  • "Shave" prompt.
  • Wilson shaving a Beefalo put to sleep using the Pan Flute.
  • Beefalo after being shaved.
  • Wilson surrounded by Beard Hair after getting a shave.
  • shaved beefalo
  • dead shaved beefalo
  • Original HD icon from Bonus Materials from CD Don't Starve.
Tools and WeaponsCraftable Items

"razor"
“A sharpened rock tied to a stick. For hygiene!”
–Wilson
“Why did I build this?”
–Willow
“My skin is too strong for hairs!”
–Wolfgang
“This is just for shaving.”
–Wendy
“EXFOLIATE!”
–WX-78
“A personal hygiene implement.”
–Wickerbottom
“A true lumberjack never shaves.”
–Woodie
“If only the world had a single neck.”
–Maxwell
“Theoretically, it can be used to shave an animal.”
–Wagstaff
“A small blade, but a blade nönetheless.”
–Wigfrid
“I watched my father use one of these.”
–Webber
“You're not coming near my legs!”
–Walani
“If only I had aftershave.”
–Warly
“Shavin's fer princes and lawyers.”
–Woodlegs
“FOR HAIR ON'ST CHINNY CHIN CHIN.”
–Wilba
“Sharp”
–Wormwood
“I've never seen a serrated razor before.”
–Wheeler
“Never hurts to have more tools.”
–Winona
“I do not shave.”
–Wortox
“Cutty thing?”
–Wurt
“I found a whisker on my chin, I'm sure my beard will come in any day now.”
–Walter
“This seems dangerous.”
–Wanda

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Dao cạo là một Vật phẩm Công cụ có thể chế tạo được tìm thấy trong Thẻ Công cụ. Nó cần 2 Cành Cây và 2 Đá Lửa để chế tạo và Máy Khoa Học để tạo nguyên mẫu. Không giống như các Công cụ khác, trên máy tính, nó không thể được trang bị và để sử dụng nó phải được nâng lên và sử dụng trên mục tiêu. Người chơi sử dụng Bộ điều khiển chỉ cần ở gần một thực thể có thể cạo râu để lời nhắc "Cạo" xuất hiện. Vì nó không có độ bền nên Razor có vô số công dụng.

The '''Razor''' is a craftable [[Tools|Tool]] [[Item]] found in the [[Tools]] Tab. It requires 2 [[Twigs]] and 2 [[Flint]]s to craft, and a [[Science Machine]] to prototype. Unlike other Tools, on pc it cannot be equipped, and to be used it has to be lifted and used on a target instead. Players using a [[wikipedia:controller|Controller]] have to simply be near an entity that can be shaved for the "Shave" prompt to appear. Since it has no [[durability]], the Razor has infinite uses.

The Razor can be used to shave [[Wilson]]'s Beard, which provides leftover [[Beard Hair]]. To shave the Beard, simply right-click the Razor while it's in the inventory, or hover over the target. The amount of Beard Hair received depends on the beard's length. The Razor can also be used to shave [[Beefalo]]s while they are sleeping (whether at night or when put to sleep using [[Sleep Dart]]s, a [[Life Giving Amulet]], or a [[Pan Flute]]), resulting in 3 [[Beefalo Wool]]. This requires taking it out of the inventory and hovering over the beefalo. The Beefalo will not wake up after being shaved, but Beefalo in [[Beefalo#Mating Season|heat]] will sometimes wake up and attack. In [[Don't Starve Together|Dont starve together]], you can use a razor to shave [[Sea Weed|sea weeds]] for up to 3 [[barnacles]]. This depends on how many barnacles the sea weed has, and will aggravate any nearby sea weeds.

== {{Pic|32|Gift Icon}} Downloadable Content ==
In the ''[[Reign of Giants]]'' DLC, [[Webber]] can also use the Razor to shave his Beard. The amount of [[Silk]] received depends on the Beard's length.

At this point, in the ''[[Shipwrecked]]'' DLC, the Razor cannot be used to shave [[Water Beefalo]].

In the ''[[Hamlet]]'' DLC, Razors can be used to shave [[Hedge]]s for 1 [[Clippings]] each.
== {{Pic|32|Prototype}} Tips ==
* Using the Razor to acquire Beefalo Wool is more efficient than killing Beefalo outright since the Wool will eventually regrow allowing players to shave the same Beefalo again for more Wool.
** If players need to kill a Beefalo anyway, it is advised to shave them first for some Wool, since even when shaved, Beefalo will still drop Beefalo Wool on death.
* Wearing a [[Beefalo Hat]] prevents Beefalo in heat from attacking the Character when they're shaving them.
* A good tip is to not shave a Beard until the first Winter is over, as the Beard (unlike [[Clothes]]) will not wear out, providing insulation as long as the player doesn't shave.
** In DLCs, it is advised to shave at the beginning of [[Summer#Reign of Giants|Summer]]/[[Dry Season]] due to the Beard accelerating the rate at which Wilson and Webber overheat and providing no benefits when fully grown during those [[Seasons]].

=={{Pic|32|Placeholder}} Trivia==
* Even though other Characters have facial hair, they are unable to shave. When examining the Razor, they will bring up an excuse for not doing it. For instance, [[Woodie]] says that "A true lumberjack never shaves."
